Oro  ·  Takeover Engine  ·  End to End

The Universal Takeover Journey

Moving a gold loan to Oro, start to finish — a bridge loan pays off the old lender, the gold is released and kept safe, then a fresh Oro gold loan completes the move. The three flows, in chronological order.
